since_last: 62% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.95%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -1.42% · Gold +1.28% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 62% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.95%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.95%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +8.34%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +8.34%, KLAC +4.86%, AMAT +4.80%, LRCX +4.78%, TER +4.35%. Laggards: DDOG -3.98%, HON -2.02%, ZBRA -1.85%, PUBM -1.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.19% at $163.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
